full_text:
Xu Chang “Yangming Emperor” 許昌 “陽明皇帝”
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Chang (許昌)aka“Yangming Emperor” (陽明皇帝)was born in Kuaiji. Raised revolt against the Han but was put down by Zang Min and Sun Jian. Xu Chang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
